headline: Dow Jones Futures: Nvidia Leads 5 Chips Near Buy Points; SpaceX Stock Needs This
summary: The stock market rose in a wild week, led by AI. Nvidia leads five chips near buy points. SpaceX stock needs this.

headline: Kulicke and Soffa, Microchip Technology, and Teradyne Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after President Trump announced Apple had agreed to design and manufacture chips with Intel in the United States, a foundry validation the market had been waiting on for over a year.

headline: Stocks Rally as President Trump Signs a Preliminary Deal to End the US-Iran War
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +0.73%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.53%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +1.62%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are up +0.80%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...
